title: Resume All AGV Movement From The API Screen
summary: Resume movement for all AGVs using the Resume All AGVs control in the AGVs section of the System HMI API screen.
when_to_use: Use when AGV movement needs to be resumed from the AGVs section of the System HMI API screen and the Resume All AGVs control is available.
not_for: Do not use this runbook for AGV removal, AGV recovery, AGV command execution, or Geek+ command resend actions.
Do not use this runbook when confirmation indicators or status feedback are required from the source, because the source does not provide them.

roles_and_responsibilities.responsibility: Open the API screen, locate the AGVs section, and use the Resume All AGVs control.

safety_notes: This is a fleet-wide control that resumes movement for all AGVs.
The source does not provide confirmation indicators or status feedback for the resume action.
access_or_tools_needed: Access to the System HMI API screen
AGVs section of the API screen

access_required: Access to the System HMI API screen
system_preconditions: The AGVs section of the API screen is accessible.
The Resume All AGVs control is present in the AGVs section.

visual_references.description: System HMI screen showing the AGV API Controls, including the Resume All AGVs control in the AGVs section.
ACB API screen used to access system, AGV, and tote controls.

steps.title: Open the AGVs section of the API screen
steps.purpose: Navigate to the screen area where AGV fleet controls are available.
steps.instruction: Open the System HMI API screen and go to the AGVs section.
steps.expected_result: The AGVs section of the API screen is visible.
steps.healthy_condition: The AGVs section is open and AGV API controls are available on screen.
steps.failure_condition: The API screen or AGVs section cannot be accessed or is not visible.

actions.label: Open AGVs section
actions.exact_action: Open the AGVs section of the API screen.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The API screen used to access AGV controls.
The AGVs section of the API screen where AGV API controls are shown.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop or escalate if the System HMI API screen cannot be opened.
Stop or escalate if the AGVs section is not available.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Users press API on the "ACB System" screen to access this screen. From this ACB API interface, the OptiSweep system, AGVs, and totes can be controlled.
Figure 4-12, titled AGV API Controls, appears on page 40 ... associated with the AGVs section of the API screen.

steps.title: Locate the Resume All AGVs control
steps.purpose: Identify the specific fleet-wide control used to resume AGV movement.
steps.instruction: In the AGVs section of the API screen, locate the Resume All AGVs control.
steps.expected_result: The Resume All AGVs control is identified on the screen.
steps.healthy_condition: The Resume All AGVs control is visible and selectable in the AGVs section.
steps.failure_condition: The Resume All AGVs control cannot be found in the AGVs section.

actions.label: Find Resume All AGVs control
actions.exact_action: Locate the Resume All AGVs control.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The Resume All AGVs control within the AGV API Controls screen.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop or escalate if the Resume All AGVs control is not present on the AGVs section.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Resume All AGVs: Resumes all AGV movement.

steps.title: Use the Resume All AGVs control
steps.purpose: Resume movement for all AGVs from the fleet-wide AGV control.
steps.instruction: Use the Resume All AGVs control to resume all AGV movement.
steps.healthy_condition: AGV movement resumes after the control is used.
steps.failure_condition: AGV movement does not resume after using the control.

actions.label: Resume all AGVs
actions.exact_action: Use the Resume All AGVs control to resume all AGV movement.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The Resume All AGVs control used to resume fleet movement.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if AGV movement does not resume after using the control.
Escalate if no confirmation or status feedback is available and AGV movement remains unchanged.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Resume All AGVs: Resumes all AGV movement.

success_criteria: The Resume All AGVs control was accessed from the AGVs section of the API screen.
healthy_conditions: The AGVs section of the API screen is accessible.
The Resume All AGVs control is visible.
AGV movement resumes after the control is used.
failure_conditions: The API screen or AGVs section cannot be accessed.
The Resume All AGVs control cannot be located.
AGV movement does not resume after using the control.
The source does not provide confirmation indicators or status feedback for the resume action.
escalation_guidance: Escalate if AGV movement does not resume after using the Resume All AGVs control.
Escalate if the required control is not available on the AGVs section.
Escalate if confirmation of the resume action cannot be established from the available source-supported indicators.

API screen entry point for AGV controls.

missing_details: The source does not provide a detailed navigation sequence beyond access to the API screen and AGVs section.
